description_long: This is a modern, matte black kettle set consisting of two distinct vessels placed on a round, dark marble-patterned tray. The taller vessel features a cylindrical body with a slightly flared spout and a side-mounted, ergonomic handle, while the shorter vessel is more rounded and lies on its side, also equipped with a side handle. Both vessels have flat, removable lids that fit flush with the top, giving them a sleek and minimalist appearance. The matte finish of the kettles contrasts with the glossy, veined marble tray beneath them. The overall design is utilitarian yet stylish, suitable for contemporary urban environments. The set appears robust and functional, with no visible decorative embellishments on the kettles themselves.
description: A matte black, modern kettle set with cylindrical and rounded vessels, each with side handles and flat lids, placed on a dark marble-patterned tray. The design is sleek, minimalist, and functional.
description_view_0: The taller kettle stands upright with its spout and handle clearly visible, while the shorter kettle lies on its side, showing its rounded end and handle.
description_view_1: The rear view highlights the rounded back of the shorter kettle and the cylindrical back of the taller kettle, both positioned on the marble tray.
description_view_2: The front of the taller kettle is prominent, displaying its spout and handle, with the shorter kettle's side and handle partially visible.
description_view_3: Both kettles are viewed from behind, showing the flat lids and the circular ends of each vessel, with minimal detail on the handles.
